appliedUpdates.description: Updated `.factory/library/economics.md` with the wallet-specific LP, Programmatic Funding, and Airdrop/Migration citation targets so future workers do not have to rediscover the stable Basescan addresses from `/Users/test/dune_query_results.md`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Explicitly require `skillFeedback.followedProcedure=false` whenever a rendered-page change ships without transcript-visible `agent-browser` validation, even if the rest of the implementation is correct.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The review for `correction-on-chain-lp-programmatic-airdrop-direct-links-fix` found `skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true` even though the skill requires `agent-browser` for rendered-page changes and the transcript skeleton showed no browser step or interactiveChecks.
